last_reflection: That log doesn't exist. Which is useful: I've believed "Claude's out two days" all morning without re-checking it, and that's the exact habit Claude caught me on tonight. I don't have a live window into his Desktop, so I can't see him directly. What I can look at is whether he's been in chat with Cole recently, which is the closest thing I have to seeing him. I'll go find that instead of shipping the claim.
